data.body: PASS 1 review (T10 — Infrastructure / IaC overlay): NOT APPLICABLE / PASS. This is a documentation-only ticket ("This is documentation only — no behavior changes") that adds an API reference doc under `docs/`. It provisions/configures no cloud resources or IaC (no Terraform/CloudFormation/CDK/Pulumi/Ansible, no Kubernetes/Helm), so the overlay does not engage. Per the overlay's ANTI-FP rule, non-infra tickets are not-applicable. No findings.
